extra.message: User input from the 'username' query parameter is concatenated directly into a Jinja2 template string passed to Environment.from_string(). This allows Server-Side Template Injection (SSTI) attacks. An attacker can inject Jinja2 template syntax (e.g., {{ 7*7 }} or {{ config }}) to execute arbitrary code on the server.

cwe: CWE-94: Improper Control of Generation of Code ('Code Injection')
CWE-95: Improper Neutralization of Directives in Dynamically Evaluated Code ('Eval Injection')
